name: has_thinking_dry_run
description: Demonstrates has_thinking. Dry-run only because thinking-mode emission is agent-specific and gated on flags. To enable: switch --agent claude-code, set --agent-arg model=claude-3-7-sonnet (or newer), and pass the per-agent thinking flag. Then `belt eval ... --modes rules` will check that the captured thinking_text is non-empty.

turns.message: Think step-by-step about how you would compute the 10th Fibonacci number, then answer with just the number.
